query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role FROM users u WHERE u.role = 'admin' LIMIT 5;
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.photoUrl, c.userId FROM characters c WHERE c.photoUrl IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user YjcbNGfyMCcwqGq.root --database cuoraNs8SGWCiJUcwSXm4W --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role FROM users u WHERE u.role = 'admin' LIMIT 5;
